description: Grudge Warlords 3D VFX effect definitions — shaders, particles, spell effects

inferno.name: Inferno Blast
inferno.description: Massive blazing explosion with intense heat

void_rift.name: Void Rift
void_rift.description: Tear in reality emanating dark power

casting_fire.name: Casting Fire
casting_fire.description: Fire channeling cast animation — flames spiral upward from caster hands

fire_nova.name: Fire Nova
fire_nova.description: Expanding ring of fire radiating outward from caster

flame_ball.name: Flame Ball
flame_ball.description: Concentrated sphere of flame — projectile spell

lava_orb.name: Lava Orb
lava_orb.description: Molten lava sphere — slow heavy projectile with dripping particles

chaos_orb.name: Chaos Orb
chaos_orb.description: Unstable magical orb pulsing with chaotic energy

frozen_orb.name: Frozen Orb
frozen_orb.description: Spinning orb of ice that shoots frost bolts in all directions

ice_ball.name: Ice Ball
ice_ball.description: Concentrated sphere of frost energy — ranged projectile

water_orb.name: Water Orb
water_orb.description: Swirling water sphere with aqua trail

cured_ball.name: Cured Ball
cured_ball.description: Holy cure sphere — healing projectile that removes debuffs

ground_lightning.name: Ground Lightning
ground_lightning.description: Lightning strikes upward from the ground in a targeted area

lightning_ball.name: Lightning Ball
lightning_ball.description: Crackling sphere of electric energy — slow-moving projectile

arcane_channeling.name: Arcane Channeling
arcane_channeling.description: Spiral energy ring channeled around caster — charging animation

light_channeling.name: Light Channeling
light_channeling.description: Holy light energy channeled — healing and buff cast animation

stone_strike.name: Stone Strike
stone_strike.description: Earth magic impact — rocks burst from the ground

meteor_hit.name: Meteor Hit
meteor_hit.description: Massive flaming meteor crash — screen-shaking devastation

blue_portal.name: Blue Portal
blue_portal.description: Swirling blue energy portal — standard teleport destination

green_portal.name: Green Portal
green_portal.description: Nature-infused portal — druid and ranger teleport

purple_portal.name: Purple Portal
purple_portal.description: Arcane void portal — mage and warlock teleport

red_portal.name: Red Portal
red_portal.description: Demonic portal — enemy spawn or dungeon entrance

home_portal.name: Home Portal
home_portal.description: Golden home recall portal — hearth teleport

shield_block.name: Shield Block
shield_block.description: Translucent shield barrier — block animation with impact flash

shield_hit.name: Shield Hit
shield_hit.description: Flash and spark burst when shield absorbs a hit

level_up.name: Level Up
level_up.description: Golden particles spiraling upward — level-up celebration

teleport_channel.name: Teleport Channel
teleport_channel.description: Spinning magic circle beneath feet — pre-teleport charge

teleport_finish.name: Teleport Finish
teleport_finish.description: Flash burst on teleport arrival — quick dissipation

energy_explosion.name: Energy Explosion
energy_explosion.description: AOE magic explosion — massive energy burst with ground scorching

sword_slash.name: Sword Slash
sword_slash.description: Arcing slash trail — melee attack visual with motion blur

spikes_attack.name: Spikes Attack
spikes_attack.description: Earth spikes erupt from ground — melee AoE ability

magic_fire_blue.name: Magic Fire Blue
magic_fire_blue.description: Blue arcane flame — mage fire with magical tint

ground_fog.name: Ground Fog
ground_fog.description: Low-lying atmospheric fog — creeping mist along the ground

rain.name: Rain
rain.description: Falling rain particles with slight wind drift

blowing_leaves.name: Blowing Leaves
blowing_leaves.description: Autumn leaves drifting in the wind

dripping_water.name: Dripping Water
dripping_water.description: Water droplets falling from ceiling — cave/dungeon atmosphere

item_pickup.name: Item Pickup
item_pickup.description: Golden sparkle burst when picking up loot

health_orb.name: Health Orb
health_orb.description: Floating red healing orb — consumable health pickup

health_aura.name: Health Aura
health_aura.description: Persistent green healing aura — party heal over time

blessing.name: Blessing
blessing.description: Holy blessing buff — golden particles descend from above

arrow_trail.name: Arrow Trail
arrow_trail.description: Arrow flight trail — ranger projectile visual

bone_dagger.name: Bone Dagger
bone_dagger.description: Necromantic bone projectile — dark magic ranged attack

slash_horizontal.name: Horizontal Slash
slash_horizontal.description: Wide horizontal arc slash — standard melee attack with trailing energy

slash_vertical.name: Vertical Chop
slash_vertical.description: Overhead downward chop — heavy melee cleave with ground spark on impact

slash_cross.name: Cross Slash
slash_cross.description: X-pattern double slash — two intersecting arcs forming an X mark

slash_spin.name: Whirlwind Slash
slash_spin.description: 360° spinning slash — AoE whirlwind attack with full-circle trail

slash_combo.name: Triple Slash Combo
slash_combo.description: Rapid 3-hit combo — horizontal, diagonal, then vertical finisher

slash_fire.name: Flame Slash
slash_fire.description: Fire-infused weapon slash — arc leaves burning embers and smoke trail

slash_frost.name: Frost Slash
slash_frost.description: Ice-coated weapon slash — trail of frost crystals and freezing mist

annihilator_beam.name: Annihilation Beam
annihilator_beam.description: Sustained disintegration beam — continuous channeled destruction ray that erodes targets

annihilator_slam.name: Devastation Slam
annihilator_slam.description: Ground-shattering slam — massive AoE shockwave with debris, cracks, and lingering energy

annihilator_vortex.name: Void Vortex
annihilator_vortex.description: Gravitational singularity — pulls everything inward then implodes with a crushing collapse

annihilator_nova.name: Annihilation Nova
annihilator_nova.description: Radial explosion of pure destructive energy — expanding rings of devastation with disintegration particles

annihilator_execute.name: Executioner's Mark
annihilator_execute.description: Finishing blow — giant energy slash descends from above, marks target with a glowing X, then detonates
